caption: The scene depicts a static, close-up view of a decorative wall featuring contrasting materials and lighting. On the left, a textured, teal-colored stone wall displays a geometric, stepped pattern of recessed and protruding blocks. Two long, slender gold light fixtures are mounted vertically on this surface, each emitting a warm, soft glow from a bulb at the top. To the right of the stone section is a vertical panel of intricately carved brown wood, showcasing a repetitive, symmetrical pattern of overlapping leaf-like or scalloped motifs. The image is a composite of four identical frames, showing no movement or change in lighting, position, or composition across the sequence. No people, text, or logos are present in the scene.
